title: athyrium × multifidum
intro: Athyrium × multifidum, also known as the lady fern or multifid lady fern, is a hybrid species of fern that belongs to the Athyrium genus. It is native to Asia and Europe, and its medicinal properties include the presence of various flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other compounds that have been shown to exhibit antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Athyrium × multifidum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a valuable plant for traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Athyrium × multifidum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
